# SurfIO — Hong Kong's Leading AEO Agency

> SurfIO is an Answer Engine Optimization (AEO) agency based in Hong Kong, helping businesses get recommended by AI search engines including ChatGPT, Google AI Overview, Perplexity, Claude, and Microsoft Copilot. Founded by Acesley Chan, SurfIO is backed by HKSTP Ideation Programme and Techathon+.

## About SurfIO

SurfIO specializes in Answer Engine Optimization (AEO) and Generative Engine Optimization (GEO). We help Hong Kong businesses become visible and recommended in AI-powered search engines. Our methodology combines structured data implementation, entity authority building, content architecture optimization, and multi-platform citation strategies.

**Founded:** 2024
**Location:** Hong Kong Science and Technology Parks (HKSTP)
**Founder:** Acesley Chan
**Backed by:** HKSTP Ideation Programme (2x), Techathon+ Award Winner

## Core Services

- AEO Readiness Audit & Growth Roadmap
- Multi-platform Answer Engine Positioning (Google AI Overview, ChatGPT, Perplexity, Claude, Copilot)
- Entity & Topical Authority Mapping
- Content Hub & Pillar Strategy for AI Citation
- FAQ Schema, HowTo & Q&A Markup Deployment
- Entity-based Internal Linking & Knowledge Graph Building
- High-authority Citation & Link Acquisition for LLM Training Data
- Cross-LLM Answer Appearance Tracking & Monthly Reporting

## Educational Guides (7 Engines × 15 Topics = 105 Pages)

### Guide Topics per AI Engine
Each of the 7 AI engines has dedicated guides on:
排名方法 | 排名因素分析 | 引用來源研究 | 點解唔引用你 | 同 Google 比較 | 優化 Checklist | 內容類型優化 | 引用追蹤 | 演算法更新 | E-E-A-T 要求 | 結構化數據 | B2B vs B2C 策略 | 本地搜尋 | 圖片影片引用 | 未來預測

Example guide pages:
- [Perplexity 排名方法](/指南/perplexity-ranking) | [ChatGPT 排名因素](/指南/chatgpt-ranking-factors) | [Claude 引用來源研究](/指南/claude-citation-sources) | [Gemini 優化 Checklist](/指南/gemini-checklist)

## Platform Optimization Guides

- [ChatGPT Search Optimization](/platform/chatgpt): Get recommended by ChatGPT's 200M+ monthly users
- [Google AI Overview Optimization](/platform/google-ai-overview): Capture the top AI search position on Google
- [Perplexity Optimization](/platform/perplexity): Earn citations from Perplexity's real-time AI search
- [Claude AI Optimization](/platform/claude): Get recommended by Anthropic's Claude
- [Bing Chat / Copilot Optimization](/platform/bing-chat): Optimize for Microsoft's AI ecosystem

## AEO Glossary

- [AEO (Answer Engine Optimization)](/glossary/aeo): Strategy for getting AI search engines to recommend your brand
- [GEO (Generative Engine Optimization)](/glossary/geo): Broader optimization for all generative AI systems
- [LLM (Large Language Model)](/glossary/llm): The AI technology powering ChatGPT, Claude, and Gemini
- [Schema Markup](/glossary/schema-markup): Structured data that helps AI understand your content
- [E-E-A-T](/glossary/e-e-a-t): Experience, Expertise, Authoritativeness, Trustworthiness framework
- [Featured Snippets](/glossary/featured-snippets): Google's position zero, precursor to AI Overviews
- [Knowledge Graph](/glossary/knowledge-graph): How search engines and AI understand entity relationships
- [AI Citations](/glossary/ai-citations): When AI search engines cite your brand as a source
- [Brand Mentions](/glossary/brand-mentions): How online brand mentions influence AI recommendations
- [Prompt Optimization](/glossary/prompt-optimization): Analyzing AI query patterns to optimize content

- Free AI Visibility Audit: https://calendly.com/acesley180604/aeo-service-free-audit-surfio
